title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Post-SIR electorate drop drives turnout surge; votes remain steady compared to 2021 election
content: As of 8 p.m. on polling day, voter turnout stood at 83.41%, significantly higher than 59.75% recorded in 2021 Assembly polls, as per ECI data; this is due to reduction in electorate from 40.57 lakh in 2021 to 28.93 lakh in 2026; number of electors who turned up in both elections remains close to 24 lakh

title: Slender loris electrocuted on power line near Dindigul
content: S. Bharathidasan, secretary of Arulagam, says insulated cables or protective casing on overhead wires must be installed to prevent the deaths of the nocturnal primates

title: T.N. records lowest increase in votes polled during Assembly elections over the last 15 years
content: While this election saw an all-time high turnout of 85.15%, a look at the data in the elections held since 2011 shows that there is no uniform pattern between the turnout and electoral verdict

title: Bengaluru firm Shree Bhagavathi Tech Labs to raise ₹50,000 cr to float, fuel 18 startup ventures
content: These ventures, span across diverse domains, are expected to create 18,000 to 20,000 jobs in the City in five years

title: SC/ST Commission recommends action against officials for non-removal of caste from name of ward in Srivilliputhur constituency
content: Residents of the area boycotted the election to protest the government’s failure to remove the caste name

title: Congress leaders introspect on not aligning with TVK
content: Many have said Congress leader Rahul Gandhi, who did not share the stage with Chief Minister M.K. Stalin and was widely believed to have favoured an alliance with the TVK, had assessed the situation accurately when he saw an opportunity to rejuvenate the Congress in Tamil Nadu

title: IREL seeks CRZ clearance for atomic minerals project in Kanniyakumari district
content: The locations identified include Keezhmidalam, Midalam, Enayamputhenthurai, Ezhudesam, and Kollengode

title: Polling percentage of women rises in T.N. this Assembly election
content: As per provisional figures available at 8 p.m. on Friday, two Assembly constituencies in Tamil Nadu — Karur and Veerapandi — posted 93.40% each, the highest polling percentage among the Assembly segments that went to polls on April 23

title: VVITU hosts seminar on intellectual property rights
content: The programme aims at underlining the role of intelluctual property rights in encouraging original thinking while safeguarding intellectual output

title: SRM University-A.P. celebrates 10th edition of Research Day
content: Research Day event receives 574 research abstracts spanning fields such as artificial intelligence, renewable energy and robotics

title: Tamil Nadu election 2026: Sri Lankan refugee camp resident casts his first vote as Indian citizen
content: “Most first-time voters are in their early 20s. I am almost 40. But I feel as if my life as an Indian has just begun, and my the future of my children as Indian citizens is assured,” R. Gokuleswaran said

title: Watch: Raghav Chadha, six AAP MPs join BJP | Above the Fold | 24.04.2026
content: In this video, we cover the major shake-up as Raghav Chadha joins the BJP, protests by Telangana RTC employees, a new Opposition move targeting the Chief Election Commissioner, Iran war and more.

title: Andhra Pradesh ideal investment destination, Industries Minister Bharat tells German firms
content: German expertise and Andhra Pradesh’s growth environment can open up new avenues for industry and employment, he says

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly polls: Voter turnout increase in the State followed spatial patterns
content: Data show the record turnout in the southern State was a consequence of the SIR exercise; while the State also registered an increase in the absolute number of voters who turned out, the provisional addition of roughly 24.8 lakh voters appears lower than the gains registered in recent cycles

title: West Bengal election: Modi promises fresh probe into R.G. Kar case after election; Mamata says BJP will get ‘zero’ in many districts
content: Union Home Minister Amit Shah, who said that he has been staying in the city for over 12 days, held a press conference at a Kolkata hotel and claimed that the BJP will win 110 of the 152 seats that went to polls for the first phase.

title: Enrica Lexie owner urges SC for early release of a ₹3 crore bond executed in Kerala HC
content: The application sought a modification of an apex court order of May 2, 2012 and a direction to the Registrar General of the Kerala High Court to release or return the bond of ₹3 crore

title: AAP slams 7 MPs who quit party, says BJP poaching through ‘Operation Lotus’
content: The AAP says the party and Punjab gave the MPs everything and still they backstabbed the people of Punjab. It accuses the BJP of using probe agencies such as ED and CBI to poach its members.

title: Days after students protest in Kashmir’s Sopore, six youths held under PSA over ‘vandalism’
content: The stringent Public Safety Act allows detention without trial for up to two years. Police say the six ‘miscreants’ were involved ‘acts of vandalism’ during the student protest in Sopore after girl students accused a lecturer of ‘inappropriate behaviour’.

title: AAP MPs walk out, casting shadow over 2027 Assembly polls in Punjab
content: The defection in AAP has exposed the party’s infighting and the crises it’s plagued with, which opposition parties immediately took advantage of following the defection

title: Three more people arrested in child trafficking cases, baby rescued in Krishna district
content: Nine people have been arrested in connection with the cases so far; of the six babies who were sold away, three have been rescued, says SP

title: Bengaluru police book 3 staff members of private college for forcing students to remove ‘janivara’ before entering CET exam hall
content: The staff members, who were on duty at the CET exam centre, allegedly forced three students to remove their janivara (sacred thread)

title: Minor raped in Gujarat’s Surat, suspect held
content: A case has been filed under relevant provisions of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) and the Protection of Children from Sexual Offences (POCSO) Act

title: Rajnath Singh to attend Shanghai Cooperation Organisation Defence Ministers’ meet in Bishkek
content: Key issues on the agenda include terrorism, extremism, and regional security concerns amid shifting global alignments

title: UDF allies air discontent over Cong. leadership hopefuls ‘lobbying’  for support ahead of Assembly poll results
content: Indian Union Muslim League, the second-largest constituent in UDF, seems particularly miffed that Congress workers are already lining up behind their preferred candidates on social media and in the physical world

title: SC declines to intervene in a plea by Indrani Mukerjea to travel abroad
content: The court tells Mukerjea, an accused in the murder of her daughter Sheena Bora in 2012, to approach the trial court where the case is pending.

title: Meta sets up automatic blocking for govt., police-referred content
content: India is now part of a small group of countries where content takedown notices are complied with immediately, giving police and the government wide powers of immediate and lasting censorship

title: ED probes suspected TTI-linked funds routed through foreign bank debit cards
content: According to the ED, its investigation revealed that there has been suspicious cash withdrawals using these foreign debit cards in Left-Wing Extremism (LWE)-affected regions, including Dhamtari and Bastar region of Chhattisgarh

title: Raghav Chadha, six AAP Rajya Sabha MPs quit party, set to merge with BJP
content: MPs Raghav Chadha, Sandeep Pathak, and Ashok Kumar Mittal met BJP president Nitin Nabin at the party’s headquarters

title: Lethal blow? Future tense for AAP as Raghav Chadha leads Rajya Sabha exodus
content: Aam Aadmi Party faces a significant internal crisis as Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha leads a mass exodus of seven MPs to the Bharatiya Janata Party. This move, following Chadha's removal as deputy leader, marks a severe blow to AAP's presence in Parliament and raises questions about its core principles.

title: Setback for Trump: US court blocks asylum ban at border
content: A US appeals court has halted President Trump's order barring asylum access at the southern border. Judges ruled immigration laws permit border asylum applications, and the President cannot unilaterally suspend this right. This decision offers a lifeline to individuals fleeing danger, ensuring they receive a hearing for their claims.

title: Hundred not enough: Sai watches Kohli take over Chinnaswamy; RCB beat GT by five wickets
content: Chasing 206, RCB got an early setback when Jacob Bethell was dismissed quickly. After that, Kohli and Devdutt took control and added 115 runs for the second wicket, putting the home side in a strong position.

title: KPMG to lay off 10% of US audit team after failed retirement efforts
content: KPMG is set to cut approximately 10% of its US audit partners after voluntary retirement schemes failed to yield desired results. The accounting giant, one of the Big Four, cited a need to align its partnership size with current business demands.

title: 'Dropped on nought': Gill reflects on missed Virat Kohli chance after GT defeat
content: “I mean, when a batsman gets dropped on nought, it's always tough on the fielder. But it's about how you come back in the game. We had our moments. But we weren't able to hit the right lengths consistently, which was important. But they batted very well in the middle overs.”

title: Raghav Chadha, 6 MPs exit AAP: How numbers changed in Rajya Sabha
content: Seven Rajya Sabha MPs, led by Raghav Chadha, have defected from AAP to the BJP, significantly boosting the ruling party's numbers to 113 and reducing AAP to just three members. This move weakens the opposition bloc's strength to 77, marking a substantial shift in the Upper House's political landscape and impacting AAP's national presence.

title: After $6.25bn 'gift' to 'Trump Accounts', Michael & Susan Dell donate $750m
content: Michael and Susan Dell have pledged $750 million to the University of Texas at Austin for a new medical center and research campus. This significant donation will focus on integrating AI and advanced computing to improve patient care, research, and education. The project, expected to open by 2030, aims to enhance Austin's healthcare capabilities and advance medical innovation.

title: Washington Commanders linked to $157M New England Patriots WR move
content: Following the 2026 NFL Draft, the Washington Commanders’ decision not to draft a wide receiver opens doors for unsigned free agents like Stefon Diggs and more. Diggs was released by the New England Patriots this offseason. He is seen as a potential fit for Washington, Atlanta, or Carolina. They all lack a top-tier wide receiver to complement their existing receiving corps talent.

title: Raghav Chadha's right hook to AAP: What led to ugly showdown & dramatic exit
content: Aam Aadmi Party's rising star Raghav Chadha has dramatically exited the party, along with six other Rajya Sabha members on Friday. The seven MP's announced their merger with BJP claiming that AAP "has now completely deviated from its principles, values, and morals". This move signals a significant internal rupture and an existential moment for the AAP, following Chadha's removal as deputy leader.

title: Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s ‘fight’ heads to court on April 27: Key points to know
content: Elon Musk is suing Sam Altman's OpenAI, alleging the company betrayed its founding mission of open-source AI for humanity. Musk claims OpenAI, now a Microsoft subsidiary, has become a closed-source, for-profit entity. OpenAI dismisses the lawsuit as a distraction fueled by Musk's competitive jealousy and his own AI venture, xAI.

title: Virat Kohli becomes third batter after Chris Gayle and Rohit Sharma to ...
content: Virat Kohli has achieved another IPL milestone, surpassing 300 sixes in the league. He now joins the elite club of Chris Gayle and Rohit Sharma, becoming the third player to reach this mark.  Kohli's remarkable consistency continues to etch his name in IPL history, further solidifying his legendary status.

title: Dhurandhar 2 day 37: Ranveer Singh film eyes Pushpa 2 record on Friday
content: 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge', directed by Aditya Dhar and starring Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, and R. Madhavan, has emerged as a global powerhouse, securing its spot as the third highest-grossing Indian film of all time with a worldwide gross of Rs. 1,766.12 crore. As of Day 37, the espionage epic is just a little over Rs. 111 crore away from shattering Allu Arjun’s 'Pushpa 2: The Rule' domestic net record and only Rs. 22 crore away from surpassing 'Baahubali 2: The Conclusion' globally. Despite being banned in Gulf countries and facing competition from Akshay Kumar’s 'Bhooth Bangla' and the ongoing IPL 2026, this U/A certified blockbuster continues its historic theatrical run.

title: 'Ghayal' turns 'ghatak': How Raghav Chadha's exit delivers 5 big blows to AAP
content: Raghav Chadha's defection from AAP to BJP, along with six other Rajya Sabha members, significantly weakens the party's parliamentary strength and national positioning. This move, which qualifies as a merger under anti-defection rules, erodes AAP's credibility and its ability to represent Punjab's interests nationally, potentially impacting upcoming elections.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo diet secret: Ex-chef reveals why he avoids milk
content: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef has revealed that the forward has completely avoided milk as part of his diet, despite its widespread use in sports nutrition. The insight offers a rare look into the specific choices behind his routine, highlighting a preference for natural foods and strict control over intake, which has supported his longevity at the highest level.‘It’s against nature’: Cristiano Ronaldo’s former chef reveals why he avoids and never drinks milk, shares daily diet details

title: Patrick Mahomes $325 million valuation shock: Off-field move amid recovery
content: Patrick Mahomes, the Kansas City Chiefs’ quarterback, is focused on his recovery from his brutal injuries as his wife, Brittany Mahomes stands by his side through all the difficult times. While both Patrick Mahomes and his wife, Brittany Mahomes, have preferred to be private about the star player’s recovery, the high profile couple recently received an update worth a whopping $325 million.

title: Dianna Russini claim shocks: Alleged confession rocks Mike Vrabel saga
content: Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down as new details emerge. Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.

title: Record! Virat Kohli scripts boundary history, first player to ...
content: Virat Kohli has etched his name further in IPL history, becoming the first player to hit 800 fours during Royal Challengers Bengaluru's match against Gujarat Titans. The star batter achieved this milestone, adding to his impressive record of 8,915 runs in 274 matches. This achievement solidifies his status as one of the league's greatest batters.

title: Is a climate pattern a bigger threat to India's GDP than the Middle East crisis? Explained
content: The India Meteorological Department has forecast the possibility of El Nino conditions during the South West monsoon season. Economists and experts note that a weak monsoon will add to the woes caused by higher crude oil prices, and fertilizer supply disruptions.

title: Scary scenes! Delhi Capitals net bowler badly hit, stretchered off in ambulance
content: A net bowler suffered a serious injury during a practice session at Delhi's Arun Jaitley Stadium, just before the IPL clash between Delhi Capitals and Punjab Kings. Footage shows medical staff attending to the player, who was then taken to the hospital by ambulance.

title: Carlos Alcaraz says he won't defend his French Open title; here's why
content: The world No. 2 shared the update on X on Friday, saying he and his team decided it was best to avoid rushing his comeback after the injury he suffered during the Barcelona Open earlier this month.

title: Intel's big gains! Why shares jumped 26% & how Trump admin benefits
content: Intel's share price surged dramatically after exceeding first-quarter expectations, driven by strong demand in its Data Centre and AI division. This performance significantly boosts the US administration's investment, which acquired a stake during a period of financial strain. Intel's stock has now risen nearly 300% since the government's intervention.

title: Dinesh Hingoo, 86, says he still works to cover medical expenses
content: Veteran comedian Dinesh Hingoo, known for his impeccable comic timing across over 300 films, has revealed that he still steps out to work at the age of 86 — not out of choice, but necessity. In a video that has gone viral on social media, the actor candidly spoke about his current reality. Opening up further about the financial strain, Hingoo added, “Doctor kabhi Rs 5000 mangte hai kabhi Rs 6000. Character artists ko itne paise nahi milte..."

title: Not the record RCB wanted: Sudharsan's century leaves Bengaluru with unwanted record
content: With Sudharsan’s hundred, RCB became the team to concede the most individual centuries in IPL history.

title: Record alert! Shubman Gill-Sai Sudharsan script history vs RCB
content: Shubman Gill and Sai Sudharsan forged a remarkable 128-run opening partnership for Gujarat Titans against Royal Challengers Bengaluru. Sudharsan shone with a brilliant century, his 100 off 58 balls powering the team's strong start. Gill played a crucial supporting role, allowing Sudharsan to dominate the scoring. This stand marks a significant achievement for the Titans.

title: 'BJP a party of illiterate goons': Raghav Chadha's old video goes viral after AAP exit
content: Raghav Chadha, formerly of AAP, has joined the BJP, a party he previously labeled as 'illiterate goons.' Chadha cited AAP's deviation from principles for personal gain as his reason for leaving. He now praises PM Modi's leadership and vows to continue raising citizen issues under the BJP banner.

title: 'Right man in wrong party': Raghav Chadha leads revolt against AAP - key points of political saga
content: In a significant political shift, Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha has resigned from the Aam Aadmi Party and joined the BJP, citing the party's deviation from its founding principles for personal gain. Chadha expressed feeling like the 'right man in the wrong party.' He announced that seven AAP MPs, including Swati Maliwal and Harbhajan Singh, are also making the move.

title: Reliance Industries Q4 results: Net profit falls 12.5%; Jio PAT rises 13%
content: Reliance Industries' Q4 FY26 net profit declined 12.5% year-on-year to Rs 16,971 crore, impacted by the Middle East crisis affecting its oil and chemicals business. Despite this, revenue rose 13% to Rs 2.98 lakh crore, with strong contributions from digital services and retail. Jio Platforms reported a 13% profit increase to Rs 7,935 crore.

title: RBI revokes Paytm Payments Bank's banking licence
content: The Reserve Bank of India has cancelled the banking licence of Paytm Payments Bank Limited, effective April 24. The central bank cited violations of the Banking Regulation Act, including mismanagement and failure to protect depositor interests. The RBI will initiate winding-up proceedings, assuring depositors of full repayment.

title: Sai Sudharsan scripts history vs RCB, becomes fastest batter in IPL to...
content: The GT opener reached the milestone in just 47 innings, going past Chris Gayle, who had taken 48 innings to get to 2,000 IPL runs.

title: IPL: Jurel bowls like Ashwin, Bumrah; Yashasvi dons gloves
content: Rajasthan Royals aim to extend their winning streak against Sunrisers Hyderabad in Jaipur. The previous encounter saw SRH secure a dominant 57-run victory. Both teams are in strong form, with RR currently second and SRH fourth in the IPL 2026 standings.

title: Lucknow: Boy sent for free Vedic education dies; 40+ injuries, 11 burn marks found on body
content: A horrific crime has shaken Kanpur as an 11-year-old student from a gurukul-style school was found murdered, bearing 11 cigarette burns and 43 severe injuries. The school operator and another suspect are in custody. Autopsy revealed internal injuries, with slides prepared amid suspicions of sexual assault. Authorities are ensuring swift justice.

title: NFL Trade Rumor: Cowboys eye risky $14 million giants star after slump
content: The Dallas Cowboys have had a pretty poor run on the field in the last two seasons with just 7 wins and 10 losses both in 2024 and 2025, sparking concern among fans. With the Dallas Cowboys’ last playoff win being in January 2023, it seems the team is focused on bouncing back on the field in the new season.

title: 7 of 10 AAP MPs in Rajya Sabha join BJP: The 3 MPs that chose to stay
content: A significant rift within the Aam Aadmi Party has led to a major exodus, with seven AAP MPs joining the BJP. This leaves the party with only three members in the Rajya Sabha, including leader Sanjay Singh, who has denounced the defectors as 'traitors' amidst allegations of 'Operation Lotus' targeting the Punjab government.

title: Rupee's valuation hits over-a-decade low: Currency hurt by Middle East war, FPI outflows
content: Rupee has hit a decade-low against global peers, driven by soaring oil prices and significant foreign investor withdrawals. This depreciation, reflected in a weakened Real Effective Exchange Rate, makes exports cheaper but imports costlier. Despite the current undervaluation, a swift recovery is not anticipated due to sustained dollar demand.

title: 'Armed forces should be kept away from politics': Ex-army chief MM Naravane
content: Former Army Chief General M.M. Naravane emphasized keeping armed forces away from political narratives, while acknowledging individual democratic rights. His remarks followed a controversy where excerpts from his unpublished memoir were cited in Parliament, sparking debates on national security and civil-military relations.

title: 'Didn't work out': Ex-KKR coach drops bombshell on Iyer's exit after title win
content: Pandit, who was KKR’s head coach when the franchise released Iyer, reflected on the move after the batter’s strong run with Punjab Kings. Since joining Punjab for Rs 26.75 crore, Iyer led the team to the IPL 2025 final, and PBKS have also remained unbeaten in their first six matches of the IPL 2026 season.

title: 'AAP no longer honest': Raghav Chadha, 6 other MPs in Rajya Sabha quit party, join BJP
content: Rajya Sabha MP Raghav Chadha has resigned from the Aam Aadmi Party, citing a deviation from its core principles and a focus on personal gain. He announced his departure alongside two other Rajya Sabha MPs, Sandeep Pathak and Ashok Mittal, who are joining the Bharatiya Janata Party. Chadha stated he felt like the 'right man in the wrong party'.

title: RCB bring in Jacob Bethell for Phil Salt - check full playing XI
content: In a big blow to RCB, their opener Phil Salt was not available for the match due to injury and Jacob Bethell came into the side in his place.

title: 'Our lives are easier, but we complain': Woman’s post on juice seller is breaking hearts
content: A Surat resident's observation of a roadside juice seller revealed the stark reality of his daily earnings. Despite selling many glasses of juice and coconuts, his net income after expenses and rent is modest, supporting a family of four. The story highlights the unseen effort behind everyday services and challenges assumptions about pricing.

title: India's forex reserves jump to $703 billion
content: India's foreign exchange reserves surged by $2.362 billion to $703.308 billion in the week ending April 17, following a previous gain of $3.825 billion. This increase, driven by rising foreign currency assets and gold reserves, marks a rebound after a decline caused by Middle East geopolitical tensions.

title: Gurugram Man Invites Fiancee, Takes 'Sex-Enhancing' Drugs, Dies Of Overdose
content: Police suspect that he had taken a sex-enhancing drug, a possible overdose of which may have led to the heart attack.

title: Row After Students Forced To Remove Sacred Thread During Exam In Bengaluru
content: As the controversy took a political turn, the college suspended the invigilator pending inquiry. The government also ordered a probe.

title: "Mamata Banerjee Leaving, BJP Is Coming": Amit Shah On Bengal Polls
content: The first phase of polling, held on Thursday across 152 Assembly constituencies spread over 16 districts, saw turnout reach approximately 92.98 per cent, one of the highest figures in the state's recent electoral history.

title: India Is "Top-Tier Security Partner": Australian Envoy To NDTV
content: The Australian National Defence Strategy places a great deal of importance on India, referring to the South Asian nation as "a top-tier security partner".

title: National Rights Panel Issues Notice Over Explosion At Vedanta Plant Which Killed 25
content: The rights panel has issued notices to the state Chief Secretary and the police chief, calling for a detailed report on the matter within two weeks.

title: US Justice Department Allows Use Of Firing Squads For Federal Executions
content: There were 13 executions by lethal injection during Trump's final six months in power, more than under any US leader in 120 years.

title: Thief Snatches Gold Chain From NRI In Ludhiana, Sister Tries To Fight Him
content: As he attempted to snatch the chain, Raj and her sister immediately fought back and grappled with the robber.

title: In Madhya Pradesh Welfare Schemes, A Tale Of Two Halves
content: The burden of implementing some financial welfare schemes largely rests on public sector banks, which are performing far beyond their targets

title: People Doubted If Ram Temple Will Be Built, But It Happened: RSS Chief
content: Bhagwat was speaking after laying the foundation stone of 'Bharat Durga Shakti Sthal' temple in Nagpur.

title: Economist Ashok Lahiri From West Bengal To Be NITI Aayog Vice-Chairman
content: Scientist Gobardhan Das, also from West Bengal, is set to be named Niti Aayog member, according to a report.

title: Opinion: Tamil Nadu 2026: Explaining The 85.15% Turnout, And A North-West Battle
content: The first point that needs to be made from the "historic" 85.15 per cent voter turnout that the state has recorded is that, in comparison with the past, this is not a historic jump in terms of real numbers.

title: Delhi Traffic Cop Hit By Car, Dragged On Bonnet For 100 Metres, Driver Flees
content: Police said the driver briefly slowed down, but as soon as the cop moved in front of the car, he accelerated again and rammed into him.

title: Karnataka Cabinet Clears 15% Internal Reservation For Scheduled Castes
content: Chief Minister Siddaramaiah said government had initially proposed 17 per cent reservation for Scheduled Castes and 7 per cent for Scheduled Tribes

title: Opinion: Opinion | Hindutva To Parivartan: Decoding Shift In BJP Campaign Strategy From 2021
content: As the principal opposition force in Bengal, the BJP too has adopted multiple strategies in its campaign

title: 6 Pakistanis Get 20-Year Jail Term In Rs 384-Crore Heroin Bust
content: The judgment, delivered on Friday, brings to a close a high-profile case dating back to December 20, 2021.

title: How A Teen's Website Helped Tamil Nadu Voters Know About Candidates
content: Called Neeyosi.com, the Class XII student's website gave the information in a crisp bullet point form.

title: Opinion: Opinion | Protest Origins To Major Rebellion: Story Of AAP So Far
content: There was a time when the Aam Aadmi Party was not just a political party; it was an emotion, an uprising, a moral assertion against a system perceived as corrupt.

title: Kerala Elections: Vattiyoorkavu MLA VK Prasanth Banks On Track Record In 3-Way Fight
content: Prasanth will aim to retain the Vattiyoorkavu Assembly seat for CPI(M) based on his performance as the sitting MLA and his past reputation as “mayor bro” of Thiruvananthapuram Municipal Corporation.

title: Chaos, confusion & grey zones: The flimsy rules controlling global supply chains
content: Priyanshi Rastogi is a journalist with The Times of India. She primarily covers national and international news, along with business affairs. Her work focuses on the latest political events, in-depth explainers, features, offbeat articles and viral social media trending stories. title: Statehood can’t be restore to oblige ‘prince’ Omar, says BJP; CM says J&K voters being punished
content: BJP leader says statehood can't be restored just because he is demanding it . he said denial of statehood would be betrayal of promises made to the people of J&K . statehood will take 'its own time', he added .

title: Urdu no longer mandatory for J&K revenue services; sparks row
content: the move comes nearly a year after BJP protested and sought revocation of a govt order that made Urdu a compulsory subject for the naib tehsildar recruitment exam in J&K . BJP called it a deliberate attempt to sideline and erase Urdu from the region’s administrative framework .

title: Six detained under PSA in Kashmir for ‘inciting’ students protest
content: the students were protesting against a schoolteacher accused of molestation . they were detained after permission from the district magistrate, as required under the public safety act . police say none is a student . the students have been jailed in jammu’s doda .
